label: NIFTY 50 TRI (index-fund proxy)
citation: UTI Nifty 50 Index Fund — Direct Plan, Growth (AMFI scheme code 120716), month-end NAV series via api.mfapi.in (AMFI-published NAVs), fetched 2026-06-12. Final point is 11-Jun-2026 (month-to-date). The fund tracks the NIFTY 50 Total Return Index; tracking difference ≈ 0.1–0.2%/yr. Rebased to 100 at the Sep-2023 month-end.
